title: Robodraw Exhibition
description: I had an exhibition at Café Kaktus in Friedberg (Hessen), where visitors could see the robots 'at work.' There were drinks and small snacks available. Musically, the exhibition was accompanied by my co-worker from Galerie Hoffmann, Mathias Henne, who provided abstract electric guitar sounds, effects devices, and a loop station. More information (but only in German) can be found in the article from the Wetterauer Zeitung Many thanks to Su Kyoung Yu and the Café Kaktus team for their support.
